hero.headline: Developer and IT support. Building web software, fullstack systems, and practical IT help.

stats.label: Open for
stats.value: Remote work, internships, and freelance projects

services.title: Web software
services.description: I build websites and web applications that are clear to use and easy to keep improving. The goal is not only a clean screen, but a product that works in real situations.

services.title: Fullstack systems
services.description: I work across frontend, backend, and the logic that connects both sides. This helps me understand how a feature should look, behave, store data, and stay maintainable.

services.title: Dashboards
services.description: I build dashboards for information that needs to be checked, compared, and acted on repeatedly. I care about clear structure, readable data, and workflows that do not slow people down.

services.title: Backend and APIs
services.description: I create backend flows, API integrations, and data structures that support practical applications. The work is focused on reliability, clarity, and making the frontend easier to build.

services.title: Technical IT support
services.description: I help with troubleshooting, setup, maintenance bugs, and everyday technical issues. Sometimes the best solution is not a new feature, but finding what is broken and making it understandable.

services.title: AI-assisted development
services.description: I use AI tools as part of my development workflow to explore ideas, debug faster, and reduce repetitive work. The important part is still knowing what to check, what to keep, and what to control.

testimonials.quote: Akmal is still early in his career, but he works with a calm technical mindset. He asks the right questions, breaks problems down clearly, and keeps looking until the issue makes sense.
testimonials.author: Internship / HR placeholder

testimonials.quote: The project direction was easy to follow, from interface decisions to backend considerations and deployment details.
testimonials.author: Seed testimonial

testimonials.quote: He pays attention to clarity, maintainability, and support after delivery, which makes the result easier for a small team to keep using.
testimonials.author: Seed testimonial
